title: Wave-3 🟡: hostless interactive components + auto-derived coverage matrix

files_forbidden: e2e/*.spec.ts (other than the three created here)

acceptance_criteria: components.spec.ts: standalone interaction tests ONLY for components with no single natural host page — toast, locale-switcher, theme-toggle (drive them on a page that mounts them, e.g. landing, asserting their interactive behaviour). Tagged @functional.

coverage-matrix.ts: a documented mapping from every one of the ~28 pages + 31 components (from context-pack.md inventory) → the spec file(s) that exercise it (page-driven D2). Pure data + a helper that derives, by scanning e2e/*.spec.ts for referenced routes/testids, which inventory items have ≥1 referencing spec.

coverage-matrix.spec.ts: a test that FAILS if any inventory page or component has zero mapped/referencing spec (proves 'every page and component is covered'). Tagged @non-blocker (informational gate per qa-checklist.md) but the assertion is real.
Read-only over other specs (no edits to them). npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright.

The matrix explicitly records that pure-presentational components (logo, icons, severity-badge, grade-display, footer) are covered transitively by the page specs that render them, naming the owning spec.
output_format: code plus the plain-English coverage matrix (page/component → spec) showing no orphans
